name: Parallax Hero Images
summary: A hero component with multiple images arranged around edges that respond to mouse movement with parallax depth.
detailedDescription: Parallax Hero Images creates an immersive hero layout with up to 8 images positioned around screen edges (top-left, top-right, mid-left, mid-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, far-left, far-right). Each image has configurable depth values (0.2-0.9) controlling parallax intensity. The component tracks mouse position normalized to -1 to 1 range, applying spring-smoothed motion (damping: 25, stiffness: 120) to reduce jitter. Images transform based on depth * mouse position, creating layered 3D parallax effect. Two variant modes exist: 'default' prioritizes corner images with higher depth, 'edge-focus' emphasizes side images. Positions use percentage-based top/left/right values (2-8% from edges). Staggered animation delays (0.12s per image) create sequential entrance. Images use absolute positioning with object-cover for full coverage. The effect works best with high-quality imagery and creates depth without scroll interaction - purely mouse-driven. This component is ideal for portfolio heroes, product showcases, or any context where floating image collage with responsive parallax creates engaging visual hierarchy.
purpose: Create parallax image collage responding to mouse
Arrange images around screen edges with depth
behavior: Applies spring smoothing to motion values
Transforms images based on depth * position
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
